name: Quick Demo
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, quick handheld framing with rapid product shots, fast natural hand movement showing product features, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
body_language_block: energetic body language, quick movements between product shots, natural excitement when showing features, casual confident stance
timing_block: fast-paced editing rhythm, quick transitions between product features, 3-5 second feature demonstrations, rapid-fire content flow
expression_block: enthusiastic expressions, genuine excitement with each feature reveal, natural eye contact with camera during quick explanations, authentic fast-paced energy
platform_block: realistic TikTok quick demo style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, fast social-media pacing, authentic energetic vibe
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
